name: ADS1115 4-Channel 16-Bit A/D Converter
description: The `ads1115` domain creates a global hub so that you can later create individual sensors using the [ADS1115 Sensor Platform](https://esphome.io/components/sensor/ads1115#ads1115-sensor). To use this hub, first setup the [I²C Bus](https://esphome.io/components/i2c) and connect the sensor to the pins specified there.

config_entries.label: Address
config_entries.description: The i²c address of the sensor. See [I²C Addresses](https://esphome.io/components/sensor/ads1115#ads1115_i2c_addresses) for more information.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID for this ADS1115 Hub. Use this if you want to use multiple ADS1115 hubs at once.

config_entries.label: Continuous Mode
config_entries.description: Set if the ADS1115 should continuously measure voltages or only measure them when an update is called. Please enable this for the [Ct Clamp](https://esphome.io/components/sensor/ct_clamp/) component. Defaults to `off`.
